reviews.review_description: Can't download such big videos - tried to wait 2 hours and still not finished. But what is more worse - download timeouts if i leave Gear VR after some time. Tried to restart download many times but no success. Please make auto-resume of timed out downloads so that there will be no need to restart them from beginning.
It is an absolute MUST have and a wonderful introduction to 360 degrees videos for family & friends. Runs smoothly on my S8 + Gear.
I don't know why people give this bad reviews, if you don't like it don't watch it. I think it's cool to see the engineering that goes into something like this.
Love when I got the app. Now I can't update the app at all. I have a Samsung Galaxy 8

developer_response.body: Hello, sorry to hear about this. Could you send an email to QA@felixandpaul.com detailing the issue and including your Device model number, Android version, and Oculus version? All can be found in Settings. Our team will be able to help you from there. Thank you!

reviews.review_description: I've been a fan of their different shows. This takes you up close and personal to some of the performances, which look to have been done specifically for this app. Ka and O were my favorites, but they are all well with viewing. Very well done.
Absolutely beautiful the way it was. Hard to describe it, you must see it. Being able to almost touch it is amazing.

I previously owned the Box of Kurios in a separate app. It was amazing, everyone I showed it to loved it. Then it disappeared but is only available on this app which won't update for me because I have no home Wi-Fi just my phone mobile data. I'd like a refund or just the Box of Kurios separate. Or this app to work with mobile data.

If the developer looks at the reviews 90% are reporting the same issues. Please developer take note. I'd willing pay up to £6 just for the Kurios app on its own if you'd return it to the app store. Please.

developer_response.body: Hey there, we'd like to help. Could you reach out to QA@felixandpaul.com detailing the issue and including your device information? We'll be able to assist from there. Thank you!

reviews.review_description:
Purchased for 3.99 but not available to download anywhere.
My phone is latest Samaung galaxy S10 plus and Gear VR
This used to be available

developer_response.body: Hello, we'd like to help. Could you send an email to QA@felixandpaul.com detailing the issue and including your Device model number, Android version, and Oculus version? All can be found in Settings. Our team will be able to help you from there. Thank you!

reviews.review_title: purchased but not in oculus library
reviews.review_description: I had this content on my previous phone for my gear vr but it didnt transfer along with my other apps. this site says i already purchased but its not available to download in my oculus library? This is my favorite app, how do i get it back?

developer_response.body:
Hi Larson, thanks for letting us know about this issue. Could you send QA@felixandpaul.com an email detailing the issue and including your Device model number (Setting > About phone), Android version (Setting > About phone > Software Information)
and Oculus version (Settings)? Our team will be able to help you from there. Thank you!

reviews.review_description: I found that when I uninstalled then reinstalled, it installed with the update.
Phenomenal, left me exhausted... wonderful experience... loved every min...
I'm on Wi-Fi and the videos freeze every few seconds.
The files seem too big to download and if I stream it constantly freezes so I never end up actually seeing anything to the end :(  shame as the quality is rather good.

developer_response.body: Hi Janey, thanks for letting us know about this. Could you send an email to QA@felixandpaul.com explaining the issue? Our team will be able to help you from there. Thank you!

reviews.review_description: Beautiful 3d images. My favorite in theVR library.

If you want to showcase VR, you will never go wrong with this application. It is a carnival and play experience felt just made for you. Note that it takes about 2 Gb per episode but it is definitely worth it. Best with 4k screen capable phone. Quality at its best.
Videos don't want to download

developer_response.body:
Hello Teseractor.

We would like to know what kind of device you're using and the OS.
Do you receive any error notification from CDS Portal app due to this?
Waiting for your feedback.

reviews.review_description: Amazing!!!
I was absolutely mesmerized by these, immediately had to get all of my friends and family to try it also. Please please do more!
I too have tried multiple times to update gets partway through and then says installing just to stop say it cant update.

developer_response.body: Hi Boyce, thanks for letting us know about this. Could you send an email to QA@felixandpaul.com explaining the issue, including your device specs? Our team will be able to help you from there. Thank you!
